title: React + Vite frontend scaffold with dev proxy
acceptance_criteria: frontend/package.json includes: vite, @vitejs/plugin-react, react, react-dom, @types/react, @types/react-dom, typescript, tailwindcss, @tanstack/react-query, zustand, axios, lightweight-charts
frontend/vite.config.ts dev server proxy: { '/api': { target: 'http://127.0.0.1:3000', changeOrigin: false }, '/ws': { target: 'ws://127.0.0.1:3000', ws: true, changeOrigin: false } }
Root package.json adds scripts: 'frontend:dev': 'cd frontend && bun run dev', 'frontend:build': 'cd frontend && bun run build', 'frontend:preview': 'cd frontend && bun run preview'
Tailwind CSS v3 configured with content paths: ['./index.html', './src/**/*.{ts,tsx}']
frontend/src/App.tsx renders a placeholder div with text 'AI Trading Agent Dashboard' — verifying the build pipeline works
Running 'bun run frontend:build' from repo root produces frontend/dist/ with index.html
output_format: code plus plain English explanation of every non-obvious decision
